title: NotebookLM 闪卡支持完全自定义与分享
full_text:
NotebookLM on X: "Flashcards are now fully customizable. Edit questions, tweak answers, and add brand-new cards to create the ultimate set of study tools.
Share them with your friends, classmates, academic rivals, etc— just be prepared for the endless shower of praise and accolades that follows. https://t.co/tKbrcMv3dU" / X
Post

@NotebookLM

Share them with your friends, classmates, academic rivals, etc— just be prepared for the endless shower of praise and accolades that follows.

discovery_record.discovery_summary: Flashcards 现已完全可自定义。编辑问题、调整答案、添加新卡片，打造终极学习工具集。 与朋友、同学、学术竞争对手等分享--只需准备好迎接随之而来的无尽赞美与赞誉。
